sections.paragraph:
verb לחלוק

to share; allot, apportion; divide; disagree, differ, be opposed; pay one's respects

verb להיחלק

be divided; differ, opposed to

verb לחלק

to divide; allot; distribute; partition

verb חולק

be divided, distributed; shared; different

verb להתחלק

be divided, distributed; to share

verb להחליק

to slide, slip; skate; smooth; flatter; avoid

verb הוחלק

be made smooth; to fall, be made to slip

verb לחלק (>>חילק)

to divide; allot; distribute; partition

masculine noun

part, portion, fraction, share, section, segment, slice, proportion, quantum

adjective

smooth, glossy, slick, slippery, even, glib, plain, satiny, glace, glare, sleek, sleeky, levigate; blank; hairless, glabrous

masculine noun

lot, fate
